message:
feat(sec65): add SEC-6.5 unit-test traceability matrix with 12 governance tests (bd-2jkio)

Machine-readable matrix mapping 16 SEC beads (WS2-WS5) to 928 tests across
37 test files. Governance tests validate: bead-to-test completeness, file
existence, minimum test count thresholds, deterministic fixture requirements,
workstream coverage, cross-reference with traceability_matrix.json, and
suite_classification.toml consistency. Also classifies 28 previously
unclassified security test files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
